scripts.//prebuild: Creates .buildstamp to bust Docker layer cache, ensuring migrations/ is never stale
scripts.migrate:status: node scripts/migrate.js dev status && node scripts/migrate.js prod status
scripts.test: npm run test:utils && npm run test:hooks && npm run test:belts && npm run test:fixes && npm run test:draft && npm run test:bots && npm run test:data
scripts.test:all: npm run test; npm run qa; npm run test:e2e; node scripts/test-summary.js
scripts.test:belts: npx tsx src/belts/BaseBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/CommonBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/FoilBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/HyperfoilBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/HyperspaceBelts.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/LeaderBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/RareLegendaryBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/ShowcaseLeaderBelt.test.js && npx tsx src/belts/UncommonBelt.test.js
scripts.test:utils: npx tsx src/utils/boosterPack.test.js && npx tsx src/utils/variantDowngrade.test.js && npx tsx src/utils/swudbExport.test.js && npx tsx src/utils/cardSort.test.js && npx tsx src/utils/aspectCombinations.test.js
scripts.test:hooks: npx tsx src/hooks/useTooltip.test.js && npx tsx src/hooks/useCardPreview.test.js && npx tsx src/hooks/common/useIsMobile.test.js && npx tsx src/hooks/common/useLocalStorage.test.js
scripts.test:auth: npx tsx lib/auth.test.js && npx tsx src/utils/auth.test.js && npx tsx app/api/beta/enroll/route.test.js && npx tsx app/api/auth/refresh/route.test.js && npx tsx app/beta/page.test.js && npx tsx scripts/makeAdmin.test.js
scripts.test:data: npx tsx src/data/cards.test.js; npx tsx src/data/cardCounts.test.js
scripts.qa: npx tsx src/qa/packGeneration.test.js && npx tsx src/qa/beltSlotAspects.test.js && npx tsx src/qa/seamAwareBelt.test.js
